name: Commercial International Bank
description: Egypt’s leading private-sector bank serving individuals, households, high-net-worth individuals, large corporations, and small businesses. Listed in Egyptian Stock Exchange (EGX), London Stock Exchange (LSE), & traded OTCQX Int’l Premier. Total assets of USD 23 bn. Established in 1975, consistently ranked as the most profitable bank in Egypt. Recognized for gender equality and other awards. Established a commercial representative office in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia in April 2019.

#  We care Our dedicated team is committed to meeting your needs

### [ On the phone  For support, including emergencies such as cards closure or immediate critical feedback. ](https://www.cibeg.com/en/contact-us)
### [ In branch  Our trained team of tellers and relationship managers are here to help you get the service you need.  ](https://www.cibeg.com/en/branch-and-atm-finder)
